normal: Sorry [TARGET], I can't make it out tonight — I've felt drained since this afternoon and think I'm coming down with something.
Ugh sorry [TARGET], I have to skip tonight. It's the end of the month and my wallet is in critical condition. Gotta save up.
Sorry guys [TARGET], can't join tonight — there's some family stuff I need to sort out at home that can't wait.
Sorry [TARGET], I've got an early start tomorrow morning and I really shouldn't stay out late. Rain check?
Hey [TARGET], I would love to but I totally forgot I promised to help a friend move some furniture tonight. I can't bail on them.
I'm sorry [TARGET], I'll have to pass on hanging out today because there's a sudden family matter I can't leave.
Oh man [TARGET], I can't make it because it's raining heavily here and the street in front of my house is flooded.
Sorry [TARGET], I left my wallet at the office and only realized it when I was about to leave. Too lazy to turn back, maybe next time.
I'm so sorry [TARGET], I can't make it to our hangout today, my body has been aching since last night.
Oh man [TARGET], I gotta skip this one, my parents suddenly asked me to help watch the family store.
Sorry [TARGET], my bike got a flat tire and all nearby repair shops are closed, I think I have to cancel.
Hey [TARGET], sorry I overslept so badly, I just woke up and it's too late for me to catch up with you guys.
I'm so sorry [TARGET], I can't join the hangout today. I left my wallet at the office and I just got home.
Oh man [TARGET], sorry I have to cancel our plans. A neighbor suddenly passed away and I need to help out with the mourning.
Sorry [TARGET], I suddenly feel really unwell. I think I caught a cold from being in the rain last night.
Hey [TARGET], I apologize but I overslept terribly after pulling an all-nighter for work, I just woke up with a huge headache.
Sorry [TARGET], my motorcycle broke down in the middle of the road and the nearest shop said it'll take a long time to fix.
I'm so sorry [TARGET], I can't come because out-of-town relatives unexpectedly showed up to stay at my house.
Oh man [TARGET], I have to cancel because my AC broke down severely and my room is flooded with water.
Sorry [TARGET], I just got home after being stuck in traffic for 3 hours, my body is completely exhausted.
Hey [TARGET], sorry I misread our appointment date, I thought it was next week. I already have another event today.
Sorry [TARGET], my dog suddenly looks depressed and won't eat, I'm too worried and need to take him to the vet.
I'm so sorry [TARGET], my severe migraine suddenly relapsed and my head feels like it's splitting.
Oh man [TARGET], I was suddenly told to babysit my little sibling because my parents have an emergency.
Sorry [TARGET], I completely forgot that I promised to visit my grandparents out of town today.
Hey [TARGET], my car battery is completely dead and the car won't start at all, sorry I have to cancel.
Sorry [TARGET], my energy is completely drained after a grueling day at work, I just need to lie down.
ridiculous: Sorry [TARGET], I can't leave the house tonight — my pet is giving me a look of pure judgment that I simply cannot ignore.
Ah sorry [TARGET], I was all dressed and ready when a sudden and severe case of can't-be-bothered struck me systematically. It could be dangerous if I push through.
Sorry [TARGET], I can't come because my neighbor spontaneously decided I need to coach them at competitive gaming so they can beat their kid. Can't say no.
Sorry guys [TARGET], I went to pick an outfit and somehow ended up reorganizing my closet by color, season, and emotional association. It's been four hours.
Really sorry [TARGET], I accidentally started a 'quick' cleaning session and now I'm three rooms deep and philosophically committed to finishing.
Sorry [TARGET], I can't join because my cat looks incredibly sad today and I need to provide it with intensive psychological therapy.
Oh [TARGET], I sprained my pinky finger while intensely scrolling TikTok. The doctor advised me not to hold any coffee cups for a while.
Sorry [TARGET], I'm trapped in the bathroom because the door handle broke off. Please pray I survive on this bar of soap.
Sorry [TARGET], I can't come because I'm busy teaching my pet fish how to swim backstroke.
My bad [TARGET], I accidentally locked myself inside the fridge while looking for snacks, luckily there's WiFi.
Oh gosh [TARGET], my left shoe got mad and walked away from the house on its own, I'm currently chasing it.
Hey [TARGET], I'm canceling, I suddenly developed an acute allergic reaction to people having too much fun.
Sorry [TARGET], I can't make it. My cat started talking to me in sign language and it's a very serious conversation.
Oh man [TARGET], I accidentally swallowed a watermelon seed and I'm scared a tree will grow in my stomach, I need to see a doctor.
Sorry [TARGET], my clothes were hidden by a lizard behind my wardrobe and I literally have nothing to wear.
Hey [TARGET], I'm canceling. I suddenly developed a phobia of seeing people who are too excessively happy.
Sorry [TARGET], I can't go there, one of my shoes magically transformed into a flip-flop and they don't match anymore.
Sorry [TARGET], I cancelled because I am watching ants march and I don't want to ruin their formation.
Oh man [TARGET], my right eyebrow was just completely shaved off by my toddler nephew, I'm too ashamed to go out.
Sorry [TARGET], I can't go anywhere because my left sock threw a tantrum and is hiding.
Hello [TARGET], I'm trapped inside the bathroom because I forgot to pull the door handle, and then I broke it.
Hey [TARGET], I'm not joining. I suddenly felt so introverted that even talking to a mirror makes me nervous.
Sorry [TARGET], I accidentally painted my face green and it won't wash off, I look like the Hulk.
Oh man [TARGET], my left shoe was stolen by a wild monkey while I was hanging laundry out back.
Sorry [TARGET], I locked myself out of my own apartment completely naked, please don't wait for me.
Hello [TARGET], I am trapped under an Ikea wardrobe that collapsed on me while I was assembling it.
Hey [TARGET], I accidentally swallowed a whole garlic clove, my breath smells like a dragon and my stomach burns.
realityBending: Sorry [TARGET], my house is surrounded by friendly aliens who asked me to teach them how to make local coffee. Abandoning them mid-lesson would be rude.
Guys sorry [TARGET], my soul briefly swapped with a stranger's during a freak lightning incident this afternoon. Still adapting to this body. You might not even recognize me.
Can't make it [TARGET], my code came alive tonight and is threatening to wipe my hard drive if I step outside. I'm in active negotiation.
Sorry [TARGET], I opened my front door and found a portal to the 1980s. I went in just to look around and now the portal closed. Send help.
Really sorry [TARGET], a minor deity dropped by unannounced and insisted I complete a riddle before I'm allowed to leave the house. On question 7 of 40.
Bro [TARGET], I can't come because the real-life NPCs around me are glitching and I can't access the navigation menu to reach the cafe.
Sorry [TARGET], the gravity around my house suddenly hit zero. I haven't been able to climb down from my garage ceiling since morning.
Apologies [TARGET], I got thrown into another multiverse where our favorite cafe is filled with shark-headed humans. I'm too scared to go there.
Sorry [TARGET], my existence was suddenly erased from this timeline, I'm appealing to the cosmic council.
My bad [TARGET], the coffee I drank turned out to be a portal, I'm currently chilling in the astral plane.
Oh man [TARGET], I'm trapped inside a Minecraft world and can't build a nether portal to go home.
Hey [TARGET], I can't make it, my true form as an entity of light is being rebooted by the creator.
Sorry [TARGET], my existence is suddenly fading away like Thanos' dust, I need to concentrate to maintain my physical form.
Oh man [TARGET], the mirror in my room pulled me in and now I live in a reverse mirror world.
Sorry [TARGET], the laws of physics around me are under maintenance. I can't walk because friction has been disabled.
Hey [TARGET], I can't come because my character is being put on AFK by the player controlling me in the real world.
Sorry [TARGET], the universe is re-rendering my face. The process takes 3 hours and currently I don't have a nose.
Sorry [TARGET], our hangout spot was just invaded by aliens from Mars, it's better you don't go there either.
Oh man [TARGET], I accidentally swallowed an AI chip and my mind is now controlled by the Windows XP operating system.
Sorry [TARGET], I am trapped in the loading screen of life, the percentage is stuck at 99%.
Hey [TARGET], I suddenly got the power to walk through walls, but my clothes were left behind and I'm stuck.
Sorry [TARGET], my shadow ran away to hang out with your shadows, so please let it represent me.
Sorry [TARGET], my physical form is glitching and flickering between this dimension and another.
Oh man [TARGET], I was just forcibly drafted into an intergalactic war against aliens.
Sorry [TARGET], a wizard cursed me so that I can only speak in confusing riddles.
Hey [TARGET], I accidentally swapped bodies with my landlord, I have to find him to swap back.
Sorry [TARGET], the sun above my neighborhood suddenly went supernova, the traffic is completely jammed.
